sentences.target: Heute spielt Mia mit der Puppe.

translations.de: Heute spielt Mia mit der Puppe.
translations.en: Mia is playing with the doll today.
translations.es: Hoy Mia juega con la muñeca.
translations.fr: Mia joue avec la poupée aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi Mia gioca con la bambola.
translations.ko: 오늘 미아는 인형 가지고 놀고 있어요.
translations.pt: Hoje a Mia está brincando com a boneca.
translations.vi: Hôm nay Mia đang chơi với búp bê.
translations.nl: Mia speelt vandaag met de pop.
translations.hi: आज मिया गुड़िया के साथ खेल रही है.
translations.el: Σήμερα η Μία παίζει με την κούκλα.
translations.nb: Mia leker med dukken i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini Mia sedang bermain dengan boneka.
translations.ro: Astăzi Mia se joacă cu păpușa.
translations.cs: Mia si dnes hraje s panenkou.
translations.da: Mia leger med dukken i dag.
translations.ja: ミアは今日、人形で遊んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb; sentence-initial frame setter modifying the whole clause.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present indicative); verb-second position.
Proper noun; nominative singular; grammatical subject of 'spielt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Definite article; dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Puppe' required by 'mit'.
Common noun; feminine singular; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Meine Tochter liebt ihre Puppe sehr.

translations.de: Meine Tochter liebt ihre Puppe sehr.
translations.en: My daughter really loves her doll.
translations.es: A mi hija le encanta su muñeca.
translations.it: Mia figlia adora la sua bambola.
translations.ko: 제 딸은 자기 인형을 정말 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我女儿特别喜欢她的洋娃娃。
translations.yue: 我個女好鍾意佢嘅公仔。
translations.ru: Моя дочь очень любит свою куклу.
translations.pt: Minha filha adora a boneca dela.
translations.he: הבת שלי מאוד אוהבת את הבובה שלה.
translations.vi: Con gái tôi rất thích con búp bê của mình.
translations.nl: Mijn dochter is dol op haar pop.
translations.uk: Моя донька дуже любить свою ляльку.
translations.hu: A lányom nagyon szereti a babáját.
translations.hi: मेरी बेटी अपनी गुड़िया को बहुत पसंद करती है.
translations.pl: Moja córka bardzo lubi swoją lalkę.
translations.el: Η κόρη μου λατρεύει την κούκλα της.
translations.nb: Datteren min er veldig glad i dukken sin.
translations.sv: Min dotter älskar verkligen sin docka.
translations.ro: Fiica mea își iubește foarte mult păpușa.
translations.cs: Moje dcera má svou panenku opravdu ráda.
translations.da: Min datter elsker virkelig sin dukke.
translations.ja: 娘は自分の人形が大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with 'Tochter' (feminine nominative singular); marks the possessor.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of 'liebt'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present indicative).
Possessive determiner; feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Puppe'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'liebt'.
Degree adverb; intensifies the predicate ('liebt ... sehr').

sentences.target: Die Puppe hat einen lockeren Arm.

translations.de: Die Puppe hat einen lockeren Arm.
translations.en: The doll has a loose arm.
translations.es: La muñeca tiene un brazo suelto.
translations.fr: Le bras de la poupée tient mal.
translations.it: Il braccio della bambola è allentato.
translations.pt: O braço da boneca está solto.
translations.vi: Cánh tay của con búp bê bị lỏng.
translations.nl: De pop heeft een losse arm.
translations.el: Το χέρι της κούκλας είναι χαλαρό.
translations.ja: 人形の腕がゆるんでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject 'Puppe'.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of 'hat'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present indicative).
Indefinite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Arm'.
Attributive adjective; accusative masculine singular; agrees with 'Arm'.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Ich kaufe die Puppe morgen im Laden.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkaʊ̯fə diː ˈpʊpə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ɪm ˈlaːdn̩/

translations.de: Ich kaufe die Puppe morgen im Laden.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkaʊ̯fə diː ˈpʊpə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ɪm ˈlaːdn̩/
translations.en: I’m buying the doll tomorrow at the store.
translations.es: Mañana compraré la muñeca en la tienda.
translations.fr: Demain, j’achète la poupée au magasin.
translations.it: Domani comprerò la bambola in negozio.
translations.ko: 내일 가게에서 그 인형을 살 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天在商店买那个洋娃娃。
translations.yue: 我聽日喺鋪頭買嗰個公仔。
translations.ru: Завтра я куплю куклу в магазине.
translations.pt: Amanhã vou comprar a boneca na loja.
translations.he: מחר אני קונה את הבובה בחנות.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi sẽ mua con búp bê ở cửa hàng.
translations.nl: Morgen koop ik de pop in de winkel.
translations.uk: Завтра я куплю ляльку в магазині.
translations.hu: Holnap megveszem a babát a boltban.
translations.hi: मैं कल दुकान से गुड़िया खरीदूंगा.
translations.pl: Jutro kupię tę lalkę w sklepie.
translations.el: Αύριο θα αγοράσω την κούκλα από το κατάστημα.
translations.nb: I morgen kjøper jeg dukken i butikken.
translations.id: Besok saya akan membeli boneka itu di toko.
translations.sv: I morgon köper jag dockan i affären.
translations.cs: Zítra koupím tu panenku v obchodě.
translations.da: I morgen køber jeg dukken i butikken.
translations.ja: 明日、店でその人形を買います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present indicative).
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Puppe'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'kaufe'.
Temporal adverb; indicates time of the action.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Common noun; masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.
